problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
hypothesis: If Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting is applied to autism, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
